## Problem Statement

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal behavior or UX.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternatives you considered.

## Scope and Risk

- Does this affect permissions?
- Does this affect overlay/core window behavior?
- Any compatibility concerns?

## Additional Context

References, mockups, or related projects.
